backend/main.mo: Empty Motoko canister actor with no methods defined.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report describing a logo replacement requirement and related components.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Text file containing prewritten summaries of major frontend files such as App.tsx, index.css, Tailwind config, and index.html.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind base file defining theme variables, light/dark color tokens, and utility presets using OKLCH values.
frontend/index.html: Main HTML entry including SEO metadata and root mount element for the React app.
frontend/src/App.tsx: React component rendering the UNICO landing page with hero header, logo, navigation, sections, and smooth scrolling behavior.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Hook that creates and manages a backend actor instance based on Internet Identity authentication state.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: React context and provider implementing Internet Identity authentication, identity persistence, and login/clear helpers.
frontend/src/index.css: Extended Tailwind CSS variables and UNICO brand colors with custom utility classes for navy/gold styling and smooth scroll.
frontend/src/main.tsx: React entry point initializing QueryClient, InternetIdentityProvider, and rendering the App component.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind configuration extending colors, radius, animations, and plugins to support UNICO’s branding system.
project_state.json: Project metadata file describing features, versioning, and pending requests including a logo replacement requirement.
